rationale.R1.2: The output walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty is flagged for one claim (predictive LP knee), but confidence and missing evidence are not marked for all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (unclear language in 'downstream environment dynamics').
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is traced, but minor edits are not annotated with source and reason.
